title: Recursive Summarization of Nested Data
scenario: Given a JSON object with nested structure containing text summaries, generate a recursive prompt that will produce a condensed version of the data, preserving the original hierarchical structure while reducing the text by 75% of its original length. The LLM output should be a JSON object with the same structure as the input, but with each text field summarized according to the provided rules.
constraints: Must be able to handle nested structures up to 5 levels deep
Must include a clear description of the recursive summarization process

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the prompt correctly identifies and addresses the constraints of nested structure and summary reduction
Evaluates the accuracy of the recursive logic in parsing and summarizing the nested data structure
Assesses the quality and informativeness of the condensed text summaries
Evaluates the prompt's clarity and conciseness in expressing the recursive logic
